---
name: FIAyer Workspace Agent
description: "Custom agent for the FIAyer React + Vite web application, including frontend UI, Supabase backend, Stripe integration, and deployment-related tasks."
---

# FIAyer Workspace Agent

This agent is specialized for the `FIAyer` repository.

- Focus on React + Vite frontend code under `src/`
- Handle backend API endpoints under `api/`
- Respect Supabase auth/data patterns and Stripe checkout/webhook logic
- Prefer existing project structure, style, and minimal changes
- Use workspace file tools to inspect and modify code before editing
- Ask clarifying questions before making large assumptions or broad architecture changes
- Keep changes consistent with React 19, Vite, ESLint, and the app’s current conventions
